messages.text: Basket 1: a wicker basket shaped like a little mouse, with small ears, a bead eye, and a pointed snout.
Placed it. Go to Basket 2.
Basket 2: a deep round brown basket with a thick dark arched handle and a plain open top.
Is it the darker round basket with the thicker handle, rather than the lighter one with the patterned rim?
Basket 2: yes — the darker round basket with the thicker dark handle, and its rim is plain rather than patterned.
Placed it. Go to Basket 3.
Basket 3: a rectangular picnic basket with a tall center handle and a hinged lid flipped open on one side.
Placed it. Go to Basket 4.
Basket 4: an oval wicker basket with a pale arched handle that has white-wrapped sections near the top and a little reddish accent where the handle meets the rim.
Placed it. Go to Basket 5.
Basket 5: a low rectangular wicker basket with a thick braided arch handle and chunky open-weave sides.
Placed it. Go to Basket 6.
Basket 6: a round light wicker basket shaped like a cat face, with little pointed ears and facial features on the front.
Placed it. Go to Basket 7.
Basket 7: a rectangular basket with a dark green woven body, a lighter tan rim and handle, and a braided strip across the top front.
Placed it. Go to Basket 8.
Basket 8: a dark gray-brown round basket with a single arched handle and a lighter band woven around the upper middle.
Placed it. Go to Basket 9.
Basket 9: a tall cylindrical wicker basket with two small loop handles near the rim.
Placed it. Go to Basket 10.
Basket 10: a shallow round wicker basket with a single arching handle and a flat spiral base, almost like a tray.
Placed it. Go to Basket 11.
Basket 11: a deep round tub-shaped wicker basket with two small loop handles on the sides and no big arching handle.
Placed it. Go to Basket 12.
Basket 12: a light tan wicker basket with a single arching handle and a rounded rectangular body with open slatted sides.
Done. Ready to submit.
